headline: OpenAI launches ChatGPT Images 2.0 with expanded visual capabilities
body: OpenAI has released ChatGPT Images 2.0, marking a significant upgrade to the platform's image generation and processing features. For healthcare AI applications, enhanced visual capabilities directly impact clinical decision support systems that rely on medical imaging analysis, pathology review, and diagnostic documentation. This advancement matters for EHR integration vendors and consulting firms building AI-assisted radiology and imaging workflows, where improved accuracy and speed reduce clinician review time. The update also signals OpenAI's continued investment in multimodal AI, raising competitive pressure on specialized medical imaging vendors to demonstrate clinical differentiation beyond general-purpose models.
